summary: All tests passed successfully. Compilation completed with minor warnings (unused function, format truncation) that do not affect functionality. Ingestion completed in 179.9 seconds for SF10 dataset (59.9M lineitem rows). Query execution achieved total time of 1.458 seconds across 3 queries. All query results validated correctly against ground truth using the comparison tool. Q6 was fastest (43ms), Q1 moderate (130ms), and Q3 slowest (1164ms) due to multi-table joins. The primary optimization metric (query execution time) is 1458ms total.
